problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
hypothesis: Combining BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
